data.title: EdgeMode Expands Spain Data Center Capacity and Equity
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

EdgeMode ( (EDGM) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 23, 2026, Edgemode, Inc. and its joint venture partners Blackberry, AIF and DC Estate Solutions Cayman Limited amended their existing joint venture to significantly expand the planned capacity of their Spain-based data centers to 4,350 MW. As part of the same addendum, stock options for 400,000,000 shares of Edgemode common stock previously granted to BAIF or its assignees were exchanged for an equal number of fully paid, non-assessable restricted common shares issued in a private, unregistered transaction under securities law exemptions, leaving all other joint venture terms unchanged.

The capacity increase underscores an aggressive scale-up of Edgemode’s European data center ambitions, signaling a substantial boost to its infrastructure footprint and potential computing output. The conversion of options into restricted equity consolidates BAIF’s stake in the company and may align partner incentives more tightly with the long-term performance of the joint venture, while avoiding the immediate dilution dynamics associated with future option exercises.

More about EdgeMode

Edgemode, Inc. operates in the data center and digital infrastructure sector, working through joint ventures to develop and expand large-scale data center capacity. The company collaborates with partners such as Blackberry, AIF and DC Estate Solutions Cayman Limited to build out facilities, including Spain-based data centers aimed at high-capacity computing operations.

Average Trading Volume: 2,882,110

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $19.49M

data.description:

Smith & Nephew Snats ( (SNN) ) has provided an announcement.

On 23 March 2026, Smith & Nephew plc reported the vesting of 2023 performance share awards under its Global Share Plans 2020 and 2010, with senior executives including CEO Deepak Nath receiving ordinary shares and selling portions to meet tax obligations. The company also disclosed the vesting of deferred bonus share awards and partial vesting of 2025 restricted share awards under the 2024 Restricted Share Plan, resulting in further share sales for tax, underscoring the continuing use of stock-based remuneration to incentivise management while modestly increasing leadership equity exposure without signaling any change in strategic direction.

These transactions, notified on 24 March 2026 in line with UK Market Abuse Regulation, involve persons discharging managerial responsibilities and are conducted on the London Stock Exchange at a reference price of £11.938637 per share. While primarily administrative in nature, the disclosures provide transparency for investors about insider holdings and reinforce regulatory compliance around executive compensation structures at the FTSE-listed medtech group.

The most recent analyst rating on (SNN) stock is a Buy with a $41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smith & Nephew Snats stock, see the SNN Stock Forecast page.

Totaligent ( (TGNT) ) has shared an update.

On March 4, 2026, Totaligent, Inc. amended a previously signed binding letter of intent with Aetherium Medical that outlines terms for an acqui-hire in which Totaligent would acquire Aetherium’s team, business plan, intellectual property, and related assets in exchange for equity. The amendment pushes the target dates for negotiating and signing definitive agreements, as well as closing the transaction, from March 5, 2026, to April 10, 2026.

The extension preserves the binding exclusivity period through April 10, 2026, or an earlier date specified in the original letter, ensuring that Aetherium remains committed to Totaligent while negotiations and due diligence continue. Other than the new timeline, all existing terms and conditions of the original letter of intent remain in effect, underscoring both parties’ ongoing intent to complete the strategic acqui-hire.

More about Totaligent

Totaligent, Inc. is a company pursuing an acqui-hire of Aetherium Medical, a business focused on medical-related intellectual property, know-how, and associated assets. The proposed transaction would see Totaligent issue equity in exchange for Aetherium’s team, business plan, and related assets, signaling a strategic move to expand its capabilities in the medical sector.

data.title: Sanofi Wins FDA Breakthrough Therapy Status for Venglustat in Type 3 Gaucher Disease
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sanofi ( (SNY) ) has issued an update.

On March 18, 2026, Sanofi announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted Breakthrough Therapy designation to venglustat, its investigational oral glucosylceramide synthase inhibitor, for treating neurological manifestations of type 3 Gaucher disease. The designation, based on positive phase 3 LEAP2MONO data showing statistically significant neurological benefit versus standard enzyme replacement therapy and a generally well-tolerated safety profile, strengthens Sanofi’s position in rare diseases and sets the stage for global regulatory filings in 2026, potentially bringing the first targeted neurologic treatment option to GD3 patients who currently lack approved therapies for these symptoms.

The LEAP2MONO phase 3 trial compared once-daily oral venglustat with biweekly intravenous enzyme replacement in GD3 patients already stabilized for systemic disease, meeting primary endpoints on measures of ataxia and cognition over 52 weeks. With prior fast-track and orphan designations in major markets, the new Breakthrough status is expected to expedite development and review in the U.S., underscoring the drug’s potential clinical and commercial importance for Sanofi and offering hope of improved outcomes for a small, underserved patient population.

The most recent analyst rating on (SNY) stock is a Hold with a $57.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sanofi stock, see the SNY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SNY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SNY is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial resilience and a constructive earnings outlook (growth, margin expansion, and buybacks). Valuation is supportive with a reasonable P/E and strong dividend, while weaker technical trend signals (below major moving averages and negative MACD) temper the overall rating.

To see Spark’s full report on SNY stock, click here.

More about Sanofi

Sanofi is an R&D-driven, AI-powered biopharmaceutical company that develops medicines and vaccines for millions of people worldwide. Leveraging its expertise in the immune system and a broad innovative pipeline, the Paris-based group focuses on addressing urgent healthcare challenges, and is listed on Euronext Paris and Nasdaq under the tickers SAN and SNY.

data.title: Dr. Reddy’s Tightens Insider-Information Disclosure Code After Board Approval
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Dr Reddy’s Laboratories ( (RDY) ) has shared an update.

On March 24, 2026, Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories’ board approved an amended Code of Practices and Procedures for Fair Disclosures of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information, aligning its internal framework with India’s SEBI insider trading and listing regulations. The updated code formalizes roles such as the Chief Investor Relations Officer, reinforces uniform and timely market disclosure, restricts selective and social media sharing of sensitive information, and mandates structured digital record-keeping and controls over legitimate access, signalling a tighter compliance posture for investors and regulators.

The company committed to promptly disseminating any inadvertent leaks of unpublished price-sensitive information, including within 24 hours of discovery, and to documenting investor interactions via website postings where required. The board also instituted detailed rules for sharing sensitive information for legitimate business purposes and for maintaining an eight-year digital database of who shares and receives such data, underscoring an operational focus on transparency, governance and mitigation of insider trading risks.

The most recent analyst rating on (RDY) stock is a Buy with a $15.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Dr Reddy’s Laboratories stock, see the RDY Stock Forecast page.

On March 19, 2026, Mannatech, Incorporated decided by mutual agreement not to renew the employment contract of Chief Financial Officer James Clavijo, whose agreement is set to expire on June 30, 2026, and he will receive three months of base salary after that date under existing terms. To ensure continuity in its financial leadership, the board appointed company Controller Yasir Haider as interim CFO effective March 20, 2026, drawing on his prior experience in global financial operations, SEC reporting, and building scalable financial infrastructure, which may support operational stability and ongoing growth initiatives during the transition.

Haider, who joined Mannatech on January 6, 2025, previously held senior finance roles including CFO and financial controller, overseeing multi-entity consolidations, financial reporting, and capital planning in complex organizations. His background in public accounting, mergers and acquisitions, and financial systems development positions him to manage the finance function during the CFO succession process, potentially reassuring investors and other stakeholders about the company’s financial oversight and strategic execution.

LGL Group ( (LGL) ) has provided an update.

On March 24, 2026, The LGL Group, Inc. announced that its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders is scheduled for May 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET at the Harvard Club of New York City, followed by an investor meeting at 10:00 a.m. ET at the New York Stock Exchange. Proxy materials will outline the record date, voting matters and procedures, while attendance at the investor session will be subject to capacity and security constraints.

At the May 12 investor meeting, management planned to detail a strategy to build a defense technology platform within LGL through selective investments, acquisitions and connectivity partnerships, and to highlight its partnership with Legion Capital, a defense technology investment platform. Executives framed this push into national security, defense and resilient infrastructure—particularly precision timing and frequency capabilities—as a way to capitalize on rising allied defense budgets and shifting procurement priorities, positioning LGL to identify and scale mission-relevant technologies across areas such as space, autonomy, electronic warfare and cyber resilience for long-term, shareholder-focused growth.

More about LGL Group

The LGL Group, Inc., listed on the NYSE American under the symbol LGL, is a holding company active in services, merchant investment and manufacturing. Its subsidiary Precise Time and Frequency, LLC produces industrial electronic instruments focused on precision time and frequency solutions from a facility in Wakefield, Massachusetts, while Lynch Capital International targets value creation through investments across diversified industries.

With engineering and design roots dating back to 1917, LGL has evolved from its origins as Lynch Glass Machinery, a glass-forming equipment maker, into a diversified owner-operator in precision engineering, manufacturing and services. The company, now headquartered in Orlando, Florida, pursues a growth strategy built on expanding both new and existing operations in markets tied to critical technologies and resilient infrastructure.

Earth Science Tech ( (ETST) ) has provided an update.

On March 24, 2026, Earth Science Tech, Inc. announced the official launch of MyOnlineConsultation.com through its MOCTeledoc, LLC unit, completing what it describes as a fully vertically integrated telehealth and pharmacy ecosystem. The platform connects a credentialed prescriber network with ETST’s compounding pharmacies, including RxCompound and Mister Meds, as well as external pharmacies, and will be marketed nationwide under the consolidated Peaks brand.

Following a cash-flow-positive beta phase, MOCTeledoc is positioned as a lean, scalable division that management expects to become a significant revenue stream alongside ETST’s compounding and direct-to-consumer businesses, which generated $25.9 million in revenue for the nine months ended December 31, 2025. By offering turnkey telehealth technology, clinical staffing and integrated fulfillment, the launch is intended to drive cross-divisional synergies, strengthen ETST’s competitive standing in digital health and create a more efficient funnel of prescriptions into its in-house pharmacy operations.

data.title: Roma Green Finance Calls April 2026 EGM to Seek Share Consolidation Authority
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Roma Green Finance Limited ( (ROMA) ) is now available.

Roma Green Finance Limited has called an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders to be held in Hong Kong on April 15, 2026, with March 19, 2026 set as the record date for voting eligibility. The board is soliciting proxies from holders of its Class A, Class B and undesignated shares, encouraging investors to vote even if they do not attend in person.

At the meeting, shareholders will vote on an ordinary resolution authorizing a share consolidation across all classes at a ratio between one-for-two and one-for-250, with the exact ratio and timing to be set by the board by October 12, 2026. The proposal would give directors broad discretion to implement or abandon the consolidation and to manage fractional entitlements, underscoring the company’s effort to preserve flexibility over its capital structure and potential share price normalization, a move of particular relevance to Nasdaq-listed issuers facing minimum price and liquidity considerations.

More about Roma Green Finance Limited

Roma Green Finance Limited is an exempted company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker ROMA. The company is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong, and has a share capital structure comprising Class A ordinary shares, Class B ordinary shares and undesignated shares, all with a par value of US$0.001 each.

PMGC Holdings ( (ELAB) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 24, 2026, PMGC Holdings said its subsidiary SVM Machining, Inc. has completed registration under the International Traffic in Arms Regulations, confirming compliance with U.S. export-control rules for defense articles and services. The ITAR status allows the California precision CNC specialist to handle controlled defense-related work, broadening its addressable customer base.

PMGC indicated that ITAR compliance strengthens SVM’s ability to bid for defense and aerospace programs that require such credentials and improves its standing as a potential supplier to Tier 1 defense contractors and aerospace OEMs. The move supports PMGC’s broader strategy to deepen its role in high-value defense manufacturing, potentially enhancing its competitive position in regulated, mission-critical supply chains.

Its wholly owned subsidiary, SVM Machining, Inc. dba Silicon Valley Manufacturing, is a California-based ISO 9001:2015 certified precision CNC machining firm that supplies engineered components to mission-critical industries including medical technology, aerospace, semiconductor, biotech, pharmaceutical, and transportation.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Actelis Networks, Inc. ( (ASNS) ).

On March 24, 2026, Actelis Networks announced it had signed a binding term sheet to acquire all shares of Israel-based Exaware Ltd. in an all-stock deal, aiming to enter the fast-growing AI-driven data center networking market. The move, which would combine Actelis’ secure edge and hybrid fiber capabilities with Exaware’s high-throughput routing and switching platforms, is intended to create an integrated, cyber-hardened architecture spanning edge, aggregation, and data center environments.

Under the proposed terms, the post-transaction value split is expected to be roughly 40% attributable to Actelis and 60% to Exaware, with 19.9% of Actelis’ outstanding common stock issued at closing and the remainder in non-voting preferred shares convertible later, subject to Nasdaq and regulatory requirements. The transaction, targeted to close by May 7, 2026, remains contingent on definitive agreements, board and regulatory approvals, and includes a 60-day no-shop period and a breakup fee, positioning Actelis to compete more directly in AI-driven network modernization if completed.

The most recent analyst rating on (ASNS) stock is a Hold with a $0.41 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Actelis Networks, Inc. stock, see the ASNS Stock Forecast page.

Actelis Networks, Inc. is a NASDAQ-listed provider of hybrid fiber, cyber-hardened networking solutions focused on rapid deployment for wide-area IoT and broadband applications. Its platforms deliver fiber-grade performance over hybrid fiber-copper networks for government, intelligent transportation, military, utility, rail, telecom, and campus customers, and include AI-based cyber monitoring to secure edge devices.

Exaware Ltd., founded in 2008 and based in Israel, develops high-throughput routing, switching, and open networking solutions for data center, telecom, and high-capacity aggregation environments. The company leverages disaggregated IP/MPLS and open networking architectures to serve carriers and infrastructure operators, and has recently expanded its role in data center networking while maintaining carrier-grade routing offerings.

data.title: Playboy Sells China JV Stake, Adopts Asset-Light Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Playboy ( (PLBY) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 20, 2026, Playboy completed the initial closing of its transaction to ultimately sell 50% of its China joint venture to United Trademark Group, with UTG now managing all operational aspects of Playboy’s business in China, Hong Kong and Macau. At this initial closing, UTG bought a 16.67% interest in the JV for $15 million, which Playboy used to pay down senior secured debt, and Playboy also received a $4 million brand support payment and began receiving guaranteed minimum JV distributions under a shareholders agreement that provides for annual minimum payments through 2033.

The deal includes a shareholders agreement that sets ownership, governance, transfer restrictions and minimum distribution obligations for the JV, with security interests granted over UTG’s JV shares and detailed termination rights for both parties. Separately, a three-year brand support services agreement requires UTG to reimburse Playboy Enterprises International for up to $10 million in total brand support services over the term, reinforcing Playboy’s asset-light strategy, reducing operating complexity in China and strengthening its balance sheet via contracted cash flows and accelerated debt reduction.

The most recent analyst rating on (PLBY) stock is a Buy with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Playboy stock, see the PLBY Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Microbot Medical Highlights Pivotal LIBERTY Study Publication Milestone
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Microbot Medical ( (MBOT) ).

On March 24, 2026, Microbot Medical announced that results from its ACCESS-PVI pivotal study of the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System have been published in the Journal of Vascular and Interventional Radiology. The multicenter feasibility study, completed in 2025 and led by interventional radiologist Dr. Francois Cornelis, evaluates a disposable, remotely operated robotic system for arterial peripheral vascular interventions.

Publication in JVIR, a leading peer-reviewed journal for interventional radiologists, marks an important validation step, confirming that the study’s methodology and data have undergone rigorous independent review. Coming after the LIBERTY system’s U.S. FDA clearance in September 2025 and ahead of its planned full market launch at the Society of Interventional Radiology conference in April 2026, the paper strengthens the device’s clinical credibility and supports Microbot’s push for broader commercial adoption.

The most recent analyst rating on (MBOT) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Microbot Medical stock, see the MBOT Stock Forecast page.

More about Microbot Medical

Microbot Medical Inc. is a commercial-stage medical device company focused on transforming endovascular procedures through advanced robotic technology. Its flagship product, the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System, is the world’s first FDA-cleared, single-use, remotely operated robotic solution designed to enhance precision, efficiency and safety in peripheral endovascular care.

Backed by a sizable intellectual property portfolio, Microbot targets interventional radiologists and vascular specialists seeking minimally invasive, image-guided treatments. The company is positioning LIBERTY as a disruptive tool in endovascular robotics, aiming to reduce radiation exposure and physical strain for clinicians while supporting broader adoption through clinical evidence.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

An announcement from Harrow Health ( (HROW) ) is now available.

On March 24, 2026, Harrow, Inc. launched a private add-on offering of $50 million in 8.625% senior unsecured notes due 2030, targeting qualified institutional buyers in the U.S. under Rule 144A and non-U.S. investors under Regulation S. The new notes will form a single series with the $250 million of identical 2030 notes issued on September 12, 2025, and will be guaranteed on a senior unsecured basis by certain existing and future restricted subsidiaries.

Harrow plans to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including growth initiatives such as new product launches, product development and strategic business development opportunities, signaling an intention to further scale its ophthalmic portfolio. The transaction, which remains subject to market and other conditions, underscores the company’s reliance on debt markets to fund expansion while highlighting execution and market risks that could prevent completion of the offering on favorable terms or at all.

The most recent analyst rating on (HROW) stock is a Buy with a $70.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Harrow Health stock, see the HROW Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on HROW stock, click here.

More about Harrow Health

Harrow, Inc., based in Nashville and listed on Nasdaq as HROW, is a leading North American provider of ophthalmic disease management solutions. The company offers a broad portfolio of medications for conditions affecting both the front and back of the eye, including dry eye disease, neovascular age-related macular degeneration, cataracts, refractive errors, glaucoma, ocular surface disorders and retina diseases, focusing on safe, accessible and affordable therapies that improve outcomes.

Founded with an emphasis on patient compliance and clinical effectiveness, Harrow has built a market position around comprehensive ophthalmic coverage rather than single-condition products. Its strategy targets both common and complex eye diseases, positioning the firm as a specialist player in the growing eye-care therapeutics market and aligning its product development with long-term demographic and healthcare demand trends.
